prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第84-92名，近年排名稳定；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音关注度一般（总排名第83位），报考热度无明显异常信号；交通运输工程A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与道路桥梁、交通工程等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，但土木建筑、材料类等专业明显劝退；本省2026年考生总数约16.7万，较2025年（约17.2万）略有减少，竞争压力略有缓解；长安大学位于陕西西安，非本省院校，无显著地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续 后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招及本省考生总数略减，在2025年基准15250名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约15782名，区间15282-16282名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8732 → 9258 → 12251 → 13320 → 15250, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6518 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15250; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 63 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 57 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 60, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84-92, stable in recent years; reputation stable in recent years, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin attention is average (overall ranking 83rd), no abnormal signals in application popularity; Transportation Engineering A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road and Bridge, Traffic Engineering, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, but majors like Civil Engineering, Architecture, and Materials are clearly discouraged; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 167,000, slightly decreased from about 172,000 in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a provincial institution, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, slight expansion of the 2026 plan, and slight decrease in the total number of provincial examinees, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 15250; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15782, with a range of 15282-16282.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Future Transportation/Computer/Robotics)
- Automation Class (Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Computer Class/Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Vehicle Engineering
- Mechanical Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Design and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering)
- Traffic Engineering

- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering Class (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Engineering)
- Materials Class (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, etc.)
- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting)
- Surveying and Mapping Class (Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Geospatial Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15282-16282, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15282), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Pilot Class, Computer Class, Automation Class); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 16282), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
